name: Silver Cloud
description: Silver Cloud is Silversea's founding ship, entering service in April 1994 as the vessel that introduced all-inclusive luxury cruising to the world. Originally carrying 296 guests, she was refurbished and converted to expedition service in 2017, now carrying just 254 guests. Her compact size is a remarkable asset — she can anchor in harbours and call at remote ports completely inaccessible to larger ships, from Greek island backwaters to Norwegian fjord villages. A true piece of cruise history, Silver Cloud remains active and relevant over three decades after she first sailed.

dining: La Terrazza (Italian, alfresco breakfast and dinner)
recreation: Expedition shore visits to boutique ports
included: All fine wines, champagne, spirits and soft drinks

name: Silver Wind
description: Silver Wind joined the fleet in January 1995 as sister ship to Silver Cloud, completing Silversea's inaugural pair. Like her sister, she has evolved over the decades and was converted to expedition service in 2021. Now carrying 274 guests, Silver Wind pairs Silversea's hallmark ultra-luxury all-inclusive experience with the freedom to explore remote and boutique destinations. Her intimate scale makes her one of the most agile ships in the fleet, calling at ports that larger ships can only dream of.

dining: La Terrazza (Italian, alfresco breakfast and dinner)
recreation: Expedition shore visits to boutique ports
included: All fine wines, champagne, spirits and soft drinks

name: Silver Shadow
description: Silver Shadow debuted in September 2000 as the first of the expanded Shadow class, carrying nearly 100 more guests than the original Cloud-class ships while retaining the all-suite, all-inclusive ethos Silversea pioneered. Built by Francisco Visentini with completion by T. Mariotti, she introduced a range of new dining venues and refined the butler service programme that distinguishes Silversea from all other luxury lines. Silver Shadow sails an eclectic programme of world itineraries, from Baltic capitals to the South Pacific.

dining: La Dame (French fine dining, Relais & Châteaux, included)
La Terrazza (Italian, alfresco dinner and casual daytime)
entertainment: The Show Lounge (main entertainment, cabaret and production shows)
included: All fine wines, champagne, spirits and beverages
All specialty restaurants including La Dame (no surcharge)
One complimentary shore excursion per port (classic fare)

name: Silver Whisper
description: Silver Whisper, delivered in January 2001, is the sister ship to Silver Shadow and the second of the Shadow class. Named by Marzia Lefebvre D'Ovidio, wife of then-chairman Manfredi, she shares the same refined layout and all-suite configuration as her sister, with every suite receiving dedicated butler service. Silver Whisper is particularly celebrated for her world cruise voyages and Grand Voyages, which circumnavigate the globe over several months with a loyal following of guests who return year after year.

dining: La Dame (French fine dining, Relais & Châteaux, included)
La Terrazza (Italian, alfresco dinner and casual daytime)
entertainment: The Show Lounge (main entertainment, cabaret and production shows)
included: All fine wines, champagne, spirits and beverages
All specialty restaurants including La Dame (no surcharge)
One complimentary shore excursion per port (classic fare)

name: Silver Spirit
description: Silver Spirit was delivered by Fincantieri in 2009 as the first of a new, larger class for Silversea — the Spirit class. She carried an expanded complement of dining venues and entertainment spaces, setting the template for the Muse class that followed. In a remarkable 2018 refit, Silver Spirit was lengthened by 25 metres at the Fincantieri Palermo shipyard, increasing passenger capacity from 540 to 608 and adding new suite categories and a revised dining concept. She remains a flagship-calibre ship in the Silversea fleet.

dining: La Dame (French fine dining, Relais & Châteaux, included)
La Terrazza (Italian, alfresco breakfast and dinner)
Silver Note (intimate jazz café with tapas)
entertainment: Enrichment lectures and Venetian Society events
included: All fine wines, champagne, spirits and beverages
One complimentary shore excursion per port (classic fare)

name: Silver Muse
description: Silver Muse was delivered by Fincantieri at Sestri Ponente in April 2017, introducing the Muse class and a transformative expansion of Silversea's dining programme. For the first time, Silversea offered eight distinct restaurant concepts aboard a single ship, including the Asian-inspired Indochine, the Japanese-inspired Kaiseki, and the signature La Dame. Named by Costanza Lefebvre d'Ovidio, daughter of then-chairman Manfredi, Silver Muse set the benchmark for the Muse-class trio and raised the bar for all-inclusive dining at sea.

dining: La Dame (French gastronomic, Relais & Châteaux, included)
La Terrazza (Italian, alfresco breakfast and dinner)
Silver Note (jazz café with creative tapas)
entertainment: The Show Lounge (full-scale productions and cabaret)
recreation: Zagara Beauty Spa (Silversea's largest spa at the time)
included: All fine wines, champagne, spirits and beverages
One complimentary shore excursion per port (classic fare)

name: Silver Moon
description: Silver Moon, the second Muse-class ship, was delivered by Fincantieri in 2020 and named by celebrated Italian winemaker Angelo Gaja's daughter Gaia Gaja. She is an evolution of the Silver Muse design, carrying the same 596 guests across 298 suites all featuring butler service, and the same eight-restaurant dining concept. Silver Moon's debut under Royal Caribbean Group's ownership marked a new chapter for Silversea, combining the founding family's culinary legacy with the investment and scale of a major cruise group.

dining: La Dame (French gastronomic, Relais & Châteaux, included)
La Terrazza (Italian, alfresco breakfast and dinner)
Silver Note (jazz café with creative tapas)
entertainment: The Show Lounge (full-scale productions and cabaret)
Enrichment lectures and wine and food events
included: All fine wines, champagne, spirits and beverages
One complimentary shore excursion per port (classic fare)

name: Silver Origin
description: Silver Origin is Silversea's first purpose-built expedition ship and the only vessel in the fleet dedicated exclusively to the Galápagos Islands. Built by Shipyard De Hoop in the Netherlands and delivered in 2020, she carries just 100 guests and sails under the Ecuadorean flag year-round. Her design was conceived from the ground up for the unique demands of Galápagos exploration — a shallow draught allows anchoring close to landing sites, Zodiacs enable wet and dry landings, and a comprehensive expedition team of naturalists, guides, and scientists brings the extraordinary ecosystem to life. She was christened by Galápagos conservationist Johanna Carrión.

entertainment: Library with Galápagos natural history collection
recreation: Guided Galápagos shore excursions and wildlife walks
On board naturalist and expedition team
included: All fine wines, champagne, spirits and beverages

name: Silver Dawn
description: Silver Dawn is the third and final Muse-class ship, delivered by Fincantieri in 2021. She is the most refined iteration of the Muse blueprint, also notable for introducing Silversea's new grey hull livery — a striking departure from the white hulls of the previous fleet. Named by American food and travel writer Nilou Motamed, Silver Dawn brings together all the hallmarks of the Muse class — eight restaurants, intimate scale, butler service — with contemporary interior touches that look towards the new Evolution class. She sails Mediterranean, Northern Europe, and Caribbean itineraries.

dining: La Dame (French gastronomic, Relais & Châteaux, included)
La Terrazza (Italian, alfresco breakfast and dinner)
Silver Note (jazz café with creative tapas)
entertainment: The Show Lounge (full-scale productions and cabaret)
included: All fine wines, champagne, spirits and beverages
One complimentary shore excursion per port (classic fare)

name: Silver Endeavour
description: Silver Endeavour is the crown jewel of Silversea's expedition fleet, acquired in 2022 from the defunct Crystal Cruises where she sailed as Crystal Endeavour. Built by MV Werften in Stralsund, Germany to Polar Class 6 standards, she is the most advanced polar expedition ship in the world at the ultra-luxury level. Carrying just 220 guests with 200 crew — an extraordinary near 1:1 ratio — every voyage comes with a full expedition team of scientists, historians, geographers, and naturalists. Christened by polar explorer Felicity Aston, Silver Endeavour is the gold standard for luxury expedition cruising.

dining: La Terrazza (Italian, alfresco and indoor casual)
Silver Note (jazz café, evening snacks and light bites)
entertainment: Expedition Lounge (daily team briefings, lectures, social hub)
Library with polar and expedition references
recreation: Expedition mudroom (equipment storage and boot station)
included: All fine wines, champagne, spirits and beverages
All expedition excursions and Zodiac landings

name: Silver Nova
description: Silver Nova is Silversea's largest ship and the first of the innovative Evolution class, delivered by Meyer Werft in Germany in July 2023. Her most striking feature is an asymmetric hull design — a first for the cruise industry — which positions public spaces and terraces to maximise ocean views and eliminate the traditional corridor-heavy layout of conventional ships. She introduces the S.A.L.T. (Sea and Land Taste) culinary programme, a Silversea-exclusive food philosophy connecting guests to the culture and cuisine of every destination through hands-on cooking classes, food-focused excursions, and a dedicated kitchen studio. Named by chef Nina Compton in January 2024 to mark Silversea's 30th anniversary.

dining: La Dame (French gastronomic, Relais & Châteaux, included)
entertainment: Arts Café (cultural hub, arts and crafts, workshops)
S.A.L.T. Bar (cocktails inspired by port destinations)
recreation: S.A.L.T. Lab (culinary studio for cooking classes)
S.A.L.T. Cellar (wine and spirits tasting room)
included: All fine wines, champagne, spirits and beverages
All restaurants including S.A.L.T. Kitchen (no surcharge)
One complimentary shore excursion per port (classic fare)

name: Silver Ray
description: Silver Ray is the sister ship to Silver Nova and the second Evolution-class vessel, delivered by Meyer Werft in May 2024 — two days ahead of schedule — with her maiden voyage departing Lisbon in June 2024. She shares Silver Nova's groundbreaking asymmetric hull design and S.A.L.T. culinary programme, and was named by ocean scientist Maria Josefina Olascoaga. Silver Ray is the newest ship in the Silversea fleet and represents the line's vision for the future of ultra-luxury ocean cruising: innovative design, destination-focused cuisine, and the same uncompromising all-inclusive luxury that Silversea has delivered since 1994.

dining: La Dame (French gastronomic, Relais & Châteaux, included)
entertainment: Arts Café (cultural hub, arts and crafts, workshops)
S.A.L.T. Bar (cocktails inspired by port destinations)
recreation: S.A.L.T. Lab (culinary studio for cooking classes)
S.A.L.T. Cellar (wine and spirits tasting room)
included: All fine wines, champagne, spirits and beverages
All restaurants including S.A.L.T. Kitchen (no surcharge)
One complimentary shore excursion per port (classic fare)
